name: Halva Gateau
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease and line 2 deep 8-inch round cake pans with waxed paper. To make the cake, in a bowl, cream sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in eggs and coffee. Stir in semolina, baking powder, cinnamon, and ground almonds. Divide between prepared pans and bake for 10 minutes. Lower temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean. Let stand in pan for 2 minutes, then turn each cake onto a wire rack placed over a plate.
Meanwhile, make syrup by putting sugar and water into a saucepan and heating gently until sugar has dissolved. Boil for 4 minutes, remove from heat, and stir in coffee. Bring back to boil and pour over the cake, allowing it to cool.
To make Halva cream, put Halva, coffee, and sugar into a saucepan and heat gently until smooth; let cool. In a bowl, beat butter until soft, then beat in the Halva mixture. Sandwich cakes together with half of the Halva cream. Spread with remaining cream and decorate with nuts. Makes 8 servings.
